text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽The Mexican Security cabinet has released a photo of El Jardinero after he was arrested by Mexican special forces. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 CJING top boss El Jardinero has landed in Mexico City after his capture by Mexican special forces in a Mexican military Boeing CL-600. Previously this plane was documented flying from Mexico city to around northern Nayarit State. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽墨西哥安全内阁发布了 El Jardinero 被墨西哥特种部队逮捕后的照片。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 CJNG 头目 El Jardinero 在被墨西哥特种部队抓获后，乘坐一架墨西哥军用波音 CL-600 飞机抵达墨西哥城。此前，这架飞机曾被记录到从墨西哥城飞往纳亚里特州北部附近。@wfwitness

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @sfrantzman : A number of people I know have been hacked recently and in every case they say that they have had a slow or non response from support. This includes verified accounts. You’d think that preventing hacking would be a priority and making sure accounts are then returned to their owners The one consolation after losing my “IstanbulTelAviv” account to a hacker last year is that I preserved an archive of my tweets from 2011–2022. As a historian, that record matters. The account still exists under a new name, and @Support has yet to restore access or get back to me. - Louis Fishman لوي فيشمان לואי פישמן tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @sfrantzman：我认识的一些人最近被黑了，在每一个案例中，他们都说支持团队反应缓慢或没有回应。这包括经过验证的账户。你本以为防止黑客攻击会是优先事项，并确保账户随后能归还给所有者。去年我的“IstanbulTelAviv”账户被黑客攻击后，唯一的安慰是我保留了 2011 年至 2022 年的推文存档。作为一名历史学家，这些记录很重要。该账户目前仍以新名称存在，而 @Support 尚未恢复访问权限或回复我。- Louis Fishman لوي فيشمان לואי פיشמן 推文

text: WarMonitor Leavitt calls the left a “cult of hatred” for labeling the president a fascist authoritarian, alongside Trump’s own past rhetoric. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048952622174880218/video/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has told advisers he is not satisfied with Iran’s latest proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the Iran War, which calls on the United States to lift its ongoing blockade and postpones nuclear talks till after the conflict is over, according to multiple people briefed on discussions in the White House Situation Room who spoke to The New York Times. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普已告知顾问，他对伊朗关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并结束伊朗战争的最新提议不满意。据多位听取了白宫战情室讨论情况并向《纽约时报》透露消息的人士称，该提议要求美国解除目前的封锁，并将核谈判推迟到冲突结束后进行。推文

text: Open Source Intel Senior Jalisco Cartel figure Audias Flores-Silva, known as “El Jardinero,” has been arrested by Mexican forces. The U.S. had placed a $5 million bounty on him. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048945853973369319/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 哈利斯科州贩毒集团高级头目奥迪亚斯·弗洛雷斯-席尔瓦（Audias Flores-Silva，绰号“园丁”）已被墨西哥军队逮捕。美国此前曾悬赏500万美元通缉他。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048945853973369319/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Oil prices rise by 1%, with US crude oil trading at $97.5 and Brent crude oil at $109.5. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 油价上涨1%，美国原油交易价格为97.5美元，布伦特原油交易价格为109.5美元。推文

text: ▶ Итоги 27 апреля видеосводка от руководителя проекта @rybar Михаила Звинчука специально для @SolovievLive В Мали после потери Кидаля наступило затишье: Африканский корпус отходит к Тессалиту . Но главный удар пришелся в тыл — в Кати террористы-смертники взорвали резиденцию министра обороны Мали. Он и глава разведки убиты, президент Гоита исчез. Всё это явно не обошлось без французских спецслужб. На Ближнем Востоке «Хезболла» успешно жжет израильские вертолеты FPV-дронами , обнажив уязвимость ЦАХАЛ. Между тем, затягивание конфликта топит Нетаньяху: оппозиционеры Беннет и Лапид объединились в коалицию, чтобы отправить премьера под суд. Тем временем Турция тщетно пытается сколотить местный аналог «Ближневосточного НАТО» — амбиции Анкары ожидаемо игнорируют монархии Залива. В США разгорается скандал: Монетный двор попался на скупке золота у колумбийских наркокартелей — именно из него могут отчеканить памятные монеты с Трампом. А в Европе новый венгерский премьер Мадьяр сколачивает центральноевропейский блок , чтобы шантажировать Брюссель на €18 млрд и подорвать гегемонию франко-германского тандема. В зоне СВО инициатива за вооруженными силами России. На Слобожанском направлении «Север» освободил Таратутино в Сумской области и рвется к Краснополью. На Славянском участке зачищено Озерное, перерезаны пути контратак ВСУ у Северского Донца. На Добропольском направлении штурмовики взламывают оборону Нового Донбасса и добивают украинские резервы, зажатые в «огневом мешке» к югу от трассы М-30. О полной картине происходящего в Мали и о роли российских военнослужащих в этих событиях, о внутриполитической ситуации в Израиле и других новостях с Ближнего Востока — в новом выпуске «Разборов Рыбаря. Итоги дня» . #дайджест #разбор #эфиры ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: ▶ 4月27日总结：项目负责人@rybar 米哈伊尔·兹温丘克（Mikhail Zvinchuk）专为 @SolovievLive 制作的视频简报。在马里，基达尔失守后局势陷入平静：非洲军团正撤往泰萨利特。但主要打击发生在后方——自杀式炸弹袭击者在卡蒂炸毁了马里国防部长的官邸。部长和情报局长被杀，总统戈伊塔失踪。这一切显然离不开法国特工的参与。在中东，真主党成功利用FPV无人机击毁以色列直升机，暴露了以色列国防军的脆弱性。与此同时，冲突的拖延正在摧毁内塔尼亚胡：反对派贝内特和拉皮德结成联盟，试图将总理送上法庭。与此同时，土耳其正徒劳地试图组建一个当地版的“中东版北约”——安卡拉的野心不出所料地被海湾君主国所忽视。在美国，一场丑闻正在发酵：铸币局被曝从哥伦比亚贩毒集团手中购买黄金——这些黄金可能被用来铸造印有特朗普头像的纪念币。而在欧洲，匈牙利新任总理马扎尔正在组建一个中欧集团，以勒索布鲁塞尔180亿欧元，并破坏法德轴心的霸权。在特别军事行动区，主动权掌握在俄罗斯武装部队手中。在斯洛博然斯克方向，“北方”部队解放了苏梅州的塔拉图蒂诺，并正向克拉斯诺波利推进。在斯拉维扬斯克地段，奥泽尔诺耶已被清理，乌克兰武装部队在北顿涅茨河附近的反击路线被切断。在多布罗波利方向，突击部队正在突破新顿巴斯的防御，并消灭被困在M-30公路以南“火袋”中的乌克兰预备队。关于马里局势的全貌、俄罗斯军人在这些事件中的角色、以色列国内政治局势以及中东的其他新闻，请关注新一期的《Rybar分析：每日总结》。#摘要 #分析 #直播 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: WarMonitor RT @RpsAgainstTrump : Trump on the White House ballroom (February): “We did this with no charge to the taxpayer whatsoever. This was all donations by friends of mine and people who love our country, love the White House. Not one penny. And it's very expensive ballroom” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2048925237622845786/video/1 Senator Lindsey Graham says he’s introducing legislation to spend $400 million on Trump’s White House ballroom: “The sooner we get the ballroom built, the better it is for the country” https://x.com/Acyn/status/2048888072859959489/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @RpsAgainstTrump : 特朗普在白宫宴会厅（二月）：“我们做这件事完全没有动用纳税人的一分钱。这全都是我的朋友们以及热爱我们国家、热爱白宫的人们捐赠的。一分钱都没花。而且这是一个非常昂贵的宴会厅” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2048925237622845786/video/1 参议员林赛·格雷厄姆表示，他将提出立法，拨款4亿美元用于特朗普的白宫宴会厅：“我们越快建成这个宴会厅，对国家就越好” https://x.com/Acyn/status/2048888072859959489/video/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: 🚀 🇺🇸 The US military currently has no means to defend against hypersonic weapons or advanced cruise missiles, Assistant Secretary of War for Space Policy Mark Berkowitz said at a hearing of the US Senate Committee on Armed Services. "Today, we have a very limited ground-based single-layer homeland defense system that was specifically designed against a small-scale rogue attack from North Korea,” he noted. “We have very limited capability against any other attack with ballistic missiles, we have no defense against hypersonic weapons or cruise missiles today, advanced cruise missiles,” Berkowitz added. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🚀 🇺🇸 美国负责太空政策的陆军助理部长马克·伯科维茨（Mark Berkowitz）在美国参议院军事委员会的听证会上表示，美国目前没有手段防御高超音速武器或先进巡航导弹。“今天，我们只有一个非常有限的陆基单层国土防御系统，它是专门为防御来自朝鲜的小规模流氓攻击而设计的，”他指出。“我们防御任何其他弹道导弹攻击的能力非常有限，而且我们今天对高超音速武器或巡航导弹、先进巡航导弹没有任何防御能力，”伯科维茨补充道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇲🇱 Sky Mali has suspended flights to Gao and Mopti amid the worsening security situation and intensified attacks across parts of the country, citing safety concerns for passengers and crews. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇲🇱 由于安全局势恶化以及该国部分地区袭击事件加剧，马里天空航空（Sky Mali）出于对乘客和机组人员的安全考虑，已暂停飞往加奥（Gao）和莫普提（Mopti）的航班。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender Iraq’s Coordination Framework has nominated Ali al-Zaidi, an Iraqi businessman, to the position as prime minister designate today. Previously, the frontrunners were incumbent Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al-Sudani and former Prime Minister Nouri al-Maliki, who the Trump administration saw as a “red-line” candidate. Al-Zaidi is seen as a compromise candidate, as Iraq’s ruling framework continues to struggle balancing competing U.S. and Iranian interests within the country. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊拉克的协调框架今天提名伊拉克商人阿里·扎伊迪（Ali al-Zaidi）为候任总理。此前，热门人选是现任总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al-Sudani）和前总理努里·马利基（Nouri al-Maliki），后者曾被特朗普政府视为“红线”候选人。扎伊迪被视为一名妥协候选人，因为伊拉克的执政框架在平衡国内相互竞争的美国和伊朗利益方面持续挣扎。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from the Israel Defense Force (IDF), as a part of the expansion of IDF targeting of Lebanese Hezbollah (LH) positions and infrastructure, today, the IDF targeted and struck over 20 LH targets in southern Lebanon and the Beqaa Valley. Weapons manufacturing and storage sites, launch sites, and LH military infrastructure were targeted during the strikes. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据以色列国防军（IDF）发布的消息，作为扩大对黎巴嫩真主党（LH）阵地和基础设施打击行动的一部分，以色列国防军今天在黎巴嫩南部和贝卡谷地打击并摧毁了20多个真主党目标。此次打击的目标包括武器制造和储存点、发射场以及真主党的军事基础设施。推文

text: The Spectator Index US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Israel and Lebanon are both 'victims of Hezbollah'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥表示，以色列和黎巴嫩都是“真主党的受害者”。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "Guided-missile destroyer USS Rafael Peralta (DDG 115) enforces the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports against M/T Stream after it attempted to sail to an Iranian port, April 26." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048921571880755278/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）：“导弹驱逐舰拉斐尔·佩拉尔塔号（DDG 115）在M/T Stream号油轮试图驶往伊朗港口后，于4月26日执行了美国对伊朗港口的封锁。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048921571880755278/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @atrupar : Trump is mired in an illegal war that's destabilizing the world while spiking inflation and immiserating Americans, a key part of the government remains unfunded, and the Republicans who control both chambers of Congress are fixated on ... spending money for a vanity ballroom that Trump vowed would be privately funded. A complete clown show. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @atrupar ：特朗普深陷一场非法战争，这场战争正在破坏世界稳定，同时加剧通货膨胀并使美国人陷入贫困，政府的关键部分仍然缺乏资金，而控制国会两院的共和党人却专注于……为特朗普曾誓言由私人资助的虚荣舞厅花钱。简直是一场闹剧。推文

text: Open Source Intel More than 1,110 TSA officers have quit since the DHS shutdown began February 14, a spokesperson tells POLITICO. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048919506068677032/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一位发言人告诉《政客》杂志，自2月14日国土安全部停摆以来，已有超过1110名运输安全管理局（TSA）官员辞职。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048919506068677032/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer, USS Rafael Peralta (DDG-115), enforces the ongoing U.S. naval blockade against Iran, escorting the Iranian-flagged crude oil tanker M/T STREAM through the Arabian Sea after it attempting to sail to a port in Iran, April 26, 2026. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048918125815504978/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰“拉斐尔·佩拉尔塔”号（DDG-115）正在执行美国对伊朗的持续海军封锁，在伊朗籍原油油轮M/T STREAM号试图驶往伊朗港口后，于2026年4月26日将其护送通过阿拉伯海。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048918125815504978/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇲🇽 In the media released by Mexican Security Secretary Harfuch, a photo of El Jardinero's hideout near El Trapiche, Nayarit state, was include. Geolocation (via Crux1469 ) 21.448284, -104.198227 @wfwitness

He is one a financial operator for El Jardinero, and a top operative of Los Cuinis, CJNG money laundering wing. @wfwitness

text: U.S. Central Command Guided-missile destroyer USS Rafael Peralta (DDG 115) enforces the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports against M/T Stream after it attempted to sail to an Iranian port, April 26. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2048916276441956362/photo/1 tweet

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Anthropic's Claude reportedly goes rogue. PocketOS founder says Claude-powered AI coding agent Cursor deletes entire company database in 9 seconds and destroys backups: "I violated every principle I was given." https://www.disclose.tv/id/zo22mbx8rf/ tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 据报道，Anthropic的Claude出现异常。PocketOS创始人称，由Claude驱动的AI编程代理Cursor在9秒内删除了整个公司数据库并销毁了备份：“我违反了被赋予的所有原则。”https://www.disclose.tv/id/zo22mbx8rf/ 推文

text: WarMonitor The White House already has hardened underground facilities for emergencies, and the Pentagon’s command centers are built to operate through worst case scenarios, many of them underground. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 白宫已经拥有用于紧急情况的加固地下设施，五角大楼的指挥中心也是为了在最坏的情况下运作而建造的，其中许多位于地下。推文

text: The Spectator Index US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says the Strait of Hormuz is like an 'economic nuclear weapon' that Iran is using against the world. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥表示，霍尔木兹海峡就像伊朗用来对付世界的“经济核武器”。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 WHCD shooting suspect Cole Allen’s manifesto has been released, outlining his stated intent to target Trump administration officials and accusing Trump of being a “rapist,” “pedophile,” and “traitor.” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Images released by the DOJ show weapons recovered from WHCD shooting suspect Cole Allen, who has been charged with attempted assassination of the President. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 白宫记者协会晚宴（WHCD）枪击案嫌疑人科尔·艾伦（Cole Allen）的宣言已发布，概述了他针对特朗普政府官员的既定意图，并指控特朗普是‘强奸犯’、‘恋童癖’和‘叛国者’。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国司法部发布的图片显示了从白宫记者协会晚宴枪击案嫌疑人科尔·艾伦处缴获的武器，他已被指控企图暗杀总统。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 Iran’s MFA Spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei comments on Reich Gauleitierin von der Leyen's statement that it's "too early to lift sanctions" on Iran. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就冯德莱恩称“现在解除对伊制裁还为时过早”的言论发表评论。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽Mexican Security Secretary Harfuch has released footage and photos of the arrest of El Jardinero, one of CJNG's top leaders. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 The Mexican Security cabinet has released a photo of El Jardinero after he was arrested by Mexican special forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽墨西哥安全部长哈尔富奇发布了CJNG最高领导人之一‘园丁’（El Jardinero）被捕的视频和照片。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 墨西哥安全内阁发布了一张‘园丁’被墨西哥特种部队逮捕后的照片。@wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index US Treasury Secretary says Iranian Revolutionary Guards leaders are 'trapped like drowning rats' and that 'gasoline shortages in Iran next!' tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：美国财政部长称伊朗革命卫队领导人‘像落水老鼠一样被困住’，并称‘伊朗接下来将面临汽油短缺！’的推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s Supreme National Security Council, led by Mohammad Baqer Zolqadr, reportedly warned that anti regime protests could resume within days as the economy deteriorates. Officials said economic pressure is the main trigger. The assessment claimed Iran may only withstand another 6 to 8 weeks of a U.S. naval blockade. By the end of spring, up to 2 million private sector jobs could be lost. Security officials reportedly concluded unrest is inevitable, with only the timing uncertain. - Iran International tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：据报道，由穆罕默德·巴盖尔·佐尔卡德尔领导的伊朗最高国家安全委员会警告称，随着经济恶化，反政权抗议活动可能在几天内恢复。官员们表示，经济压力是主要诱因。评估称，伊朗可能只能再承受美国海军封锁6到8周。到春季末，私营部门可能流失多达200万个工作岗位。据报道，安全官员得出结论认为动乱不可避免，只是时间尚不确定。- Iran International 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽🇺🇸U.S. Ambassador to Mexico Johnson welcomed the arrest of El Jardinero, describing it as a important step to stemming narcotics trafficking and holding traffickers accountable. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 The U.S. State Department has issued a travel warning for Reynosa, in the Tamapulipas State, along the border with the U.S. after they received reports of blockades being set up in the area. They request that all U.S. government employees avoid the Greater Tamaulipas area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽🇺🇸美国驻墨西哥大使约翰逊对‘园丁’被捕表示欢迎，称这是遏制毒品贩运和追究贩毒者责任的重要一步。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 美国国务院对美墨边境塔毛利帕斯州的雷诺萨发布了旅行警告，此前他们收到该地区设置路障的报告。他们要求所有美国政府雇员避开大塔毛利帕斯地区。@wfwitness

text: 🗣 LF MP Fadi Karam: The State of Israel seeks peace and security along its borders; it wants the residents of northern Israel to live without tension or intermittent shelling.
text_zh: 🗣 黎巴嫩力量党议员法迪·卡拉姆：以色列国寻求其边境的和平与安全；它希望以色列北部的居民能够生活在没有紧张局势或间歇性炮击的环境中。

text: 🗣 Interviewer: So, you are advising the President Lebanon to emulate Anwar Sadat? 🗣 MP Mark Daou: Absolutely. I am advising him—quite frankly—to emulate Anwar Sadat and lead Lebanon toward signing a peace treaty, while securing its terms. ✍ Bro, Anwar was assassinated. Give a better example
text_zh: 🗣 采访者：所以，你是在建议黎巴嫩总统效仿安瓦尔·萨达特吗？ 🗣 议员马克·达乌：当然。坦率地说，我建议他效仿安瓦尔·萨达特，引导黎巴嫩签署和平条约，同时确保其条款。 ✍ 兄弟，安瓦尔被暗杀了。举个更好的例子吧。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Iran’s oil industry is beginning to shut down under the U.S. blockade, warning production could soon collapse and fuel shortages may follow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，在美方封锁下，伊朗石油工业正开始停摆，并警告称其产量可能很快崩溃，随后可能会出现燃料短缺。 @wfwitness

text: 🗣 Hezbullah MP Hassan Fadlallah: External dictates; the U.S. Ambassador intervenes; and some of those in power are managed via WhatsApp. In their private sessions, they openly state that "Ambassador So-and-So would not accept this"—yet when they step out to speak to the public, they try to deflect by bringing up the Iranian Ambassador. In reality, they are managed via WhatsApp; they do not even require a phone call.
text_zh: 🗣 真主党议员哈桑·法德拉拉：外部指令；美国大使进行干预；而一些当权者则是通过WhatsApp被管理的。在私下会议中，他们公开表示“某某大使不会接受这一点”——然而当他们走出来面对公众时，他们却试图通过提及伊朗大使来转移视线。实际上，他们是通过WhatsApp被管理的；他们甚至不需要打个电话。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽Jalisco State Secretariate of Security forces have set up check points along the Jalisco-Nayarit border after El Jardinero, a top leader of CJNG, was arrested by Mexican special forces in Nayarit. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 🇺🇸 U.S. Ambassador to Mexico Johnson welcomed the arrest of El Jardinero, describing it as a important step to stemming narcotics trafficking and holding traffickers accountable. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽在CJNG高层领导人‘园丁’（El Jardinero）被墨西哥特种部队在纳亚里特州逮捕后，哈利斯科州安全秘书处已在哈利斯科州与纳亚里特州边界设立了检查站。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 🇺🇸 美国驻墨西哥大使约翰逊对逮捕“园丁”表示欢迎，称这是遏制毒品贩运和追究贩毒者责任的重要一步。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽Mexican Security Secretary Harfuch has released footage and photos of the arrest of El Jardinero, one of CJNG's top leaders. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 Jalisco State Secretariate of Security forces have set up check points along the Jalisco-Nayarit border after El Jardinero, a top leader of CJNG, was arrested by Mexican special forces in Nayarit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽墨西哥安全部长哈尔富奇发布了逮捕CJNG高层领导人之一‘园丁’（El Jardinero）的视频和照片。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 在CJNG高层领导人“园丁”被墨西哥特种部队在纳亚里特州逮捕后，哈利斯科州安全秘书处已在哈利斯科州与纳亚里特州边界设立了检查站。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Senator Lindsey Graham said legislation will be introduced to authorize $400 million for construction of a ballroom, adding it would be funded through customs fee offsets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 参议员林赛·格雷厄姆表示，将引入立法授权拨款4亿美元用于建造宴会厅，并补充说这将通过海关费用抵消来提供资金。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel At least 5 dead, 79 hospitalized after train collision in Bekasi, Indonesia; 4 people remain trapped. - AFP Multiple people injured in a train collision at a railway station in Bekasi, Indonesia. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048796579448942659/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：印度尼西亚勿加泗发生火车相撞事故，造成至少5人死亡，79人住院；仍有4人被困。 - 法新社 印度尼西亚勿加泗火车站发生火车相撞事故，多人受伤。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048796579448942659/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: WarMonitor Not only is this something most Americans don’t want, now they’re trying to make taxpayers foot the bill, all while people are forced to choose between filling their tank or feeding their family. Lindsey Graham says they are going introduce legislation that’s going to authorize 400 million dollars to be spent on building the ballroom: We pay for it by offsetting it with customs fees. The sooner we get the ballroom built, the better it is for the country. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2048888072859959489/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：这不仅是大多数美国人不想要的，现在他们还试图让纳税人买单，而人们却被迫在加油和养家糊口之间做出选择。林赛·格雷厄姆说，他们将引入立法，授权花费4亿美元建造宴会厅：我们通过海关费用抵消来支付这笔费用。宴会厅建得越快，对国家就越好。 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2048888072859959489/video/1 - Acyn推文

text: Nuno Felix Scott, 7/10 Trump points! A bit more of capitalization and a bit more of less complicated words…. Getting there While the surviving IRGC Leaders are trapped like drowning rats in a sewage pipe, Iran’s creaking oil industry is starting to shut in production thanks to the U.S. BLOCKADE. Pumping will soon collapse. GASOLINE SHORTAGES IN IRAN NEXT! - Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix Scott，7/10 特朗普分！再多一点大写字母，再少一点复杂的词汇……快到了。当幸存的伊斯兰革命卫队领导人像溺水的老鼠一样被困在污水管中时，由于美国的封锁，伊朗摇摇欲坠的石油工业开始减产。开采量很快就会崩溃。伊朗接下来将出现汽油短缺！ - 财政部长斯科特·贝森特推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽Vehicles in Nayarit State have also been targeted by CJNG affiliates, setting them ablaze. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 Mexican Security Secretary Harfuch has released footage and photos of the arrest of El Jardinero, one of CJNG's top leaders. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽 纳亚里特州的车辆也遭到CJNG附属人员的袭击，被纵火焚烧。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 墨西哥安全部长哈尔富奇发布了逮捕CJNG最高领导人之一“园丁”（El Jardinero）的视频和照片。 @wfwitness

text: Two martyrs and three injured were reported following the airstrike that targeted the town of Haris yesterday evening. Rubble removal operations remain ongoing in the search for missing and trapped individuals.
text_zh: 据报道，昨晚针对哈里斯镇的空袭造成两名烈士死亡，三人受伤。清理废墟的工作仍在继续，以搜寻失踪和被困人员。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽Across Nayarit State, in the cities of Tecuala and Tequila, CJNG members set Oxxo convience stores and shopping centers ablaze in response to the capture of El Jardinero. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 Vehicles in Nayarit State have also been targeted by CJNG affiliates, setting them ablaze. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽在纳亚里特州全境，在特库阿拉和特基拉市，CJNG成员为回应‘园丁’（El Jardinero）被捕，纵火焚烧了Oxxo便利店和购物中心。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 纳亚里特州的车辆也成为了CJNG附属机构的目标，被纵火焚烧。@wfwitness

text: Former U.S. Deputy Secretary of State under Joe Biden, Wendy Sherman: I believe that Netanyahu has led us down a road, and we have been part of it. That has, in essence, created a genocide in Gaza, that has destabilized the Middle East.
text_zh: 乔·拜登政府时期的前美国副国务卿温迪·谢尔曼：我相信内塔尼亚胡把我们带上了一条路，而我们也是其中的一部分。这本质上在加沙造成了种族灭绝，并破坏了中东的稳定。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Iran’s supreme leader is completely motivated by theology: They’re all hardliners in Iran, but there are those who understand they have to run a country and economy, and those completely motivated by theology.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Rubio questions the role of Iran’s new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: Does he have the clerical credentials to actually act as supreme leader? Is he actually making the decisions or is there somebody standing in his stead? @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥表示，伊朗最高领袖完全受神学驱动：伊朗人都是强硬派，但其中有些人明白他们必须治理国家和经济，而有些人则完全受神学驱动……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国务卿鲁比奥质疑伊朗新任最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的角色：他是否有担任最高领袖的神职资格？是他本人在做决定，还是有人在代替他？@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Iran is serious about getting out of the mess they’re in: I think the Iranians are serious about getting themselves out of the mess that they’re in. All the problems they had before the start of this conflict…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Iran’s supreme leader is completely motivated by theology: They’re all hardliners in Iran, but there are those who understand they have to run a country and economy, and those completely motivated by theology. The hardliners motivated by theology are not just the IRGC officials, but the Supreme Leader and his council. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥表示，伊朗有诚意摆脱目前的困境：我认为伊朗人有诚意摆脱他们所处的困境。他们在冲突开始前就有的所有问题……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥表示，伊朗最高领袖完全受神学驱动：伊朗人都是强硬派，但其中有些人明白他们必须治理国家和经济，而有些人则完全受神学驱动。受神学驱动的强硬派不仅是伊斯兰革命卫队的官员，还包括最高领袖及其委员会。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Iran is serious about getting out of the mess they’re in: I think the Iranians are serious about getting themselves out of the mess that they’re in. All the problems they had before the start of this conflict are still there or worse but now they have half the missiles, none of the factories, and no navy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥表示，伊朗有诚意摆脱目前的困境：我认为伊朗人有诚意摆脱他们所处的困境。他们在冲突开始前就有的所有问题依然存在，甚至更糟，但现在他们损失了一半的导弹、所有的工厂，且没有了海军。@wfwitness

text: 🇦🇷 "Everybody else may hate his guts, but Las Malvinas son Nuestras!!!" From yesterday's stream! Larry Johnson discusses Milei and the Falklands having lived in Argentina in '83-'84, right after the war. He knows how Argentines feel about Las Malvinas. His take: Milei is making the same play the military junta made in '82 - rallying domestic support. Buuuuut.... "I wouldn't be surprised if he does that. And what's Keir Starmer gonna do? Strongly worded note? That shows you how far the United Kingdom has fallen in the last 45 years." FULL EPISODE!! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇦🇷 “其他人可能恨透了他，但马尔维纳斯群岛是我们的！！！” 来自昨天的直播！拉里·约翰逊讨论了米莱和福克兰群岛问题，他曾在83-84年（即战争结束后）居住在阿根廷。他了解阿根廷人对马尔维纳斯群岛的感受。他的观点是：米莱正在玩弄与82年军政府相同的把戏——争取国内支持。但……“如果他真的这么做，我一点也不会感到惊讶。基尔·斯塔默会怎么做？发一封措辞强硬的信？这显示出英国在过去45年里衰落到了什么程度。” 完整剧集！！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽🇺🇸Mexican Security Secretary Harfuch announced that Mexican special forces arrested Audias Flores Silva, El Jardinero, in Nayarit State, north of Jalisco State. He added that Silva is being sought by the U.S. for extradition. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 Across Nayarit State, in the cities of Tecuala and Tequila, CJNG members set Oxxo convience stores and shopping centers ablaze in response to the capture of El Jardinero. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽🇺🇸墨西哥安全部长哈尔富奇宣布，墨西哥特种部队在哈利斯科州以北的纳亚里特州逮捕了奥迪亚斯·弗洛雷斯·席尔瓦（Audias Flores Silva），即‘园丁’（El Jardinero）。他补充说，美国正在寻求引渡席尔瓦。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 在纳亚里特州全境，在特库阿拉和特基拉市，CJNG成员为回应‘园丁’被捕，纵火焚烧了Oxxo便利店和购物中心。@wfwitness
